commands.name: output
commands.title: Output Devices
commands.description: Per-app speaker volume, mute, and routing

commands.name: reset-all
commands.title: Reset All to 100%
commands.description: Reset all apps to 100% and unmute

preferences.name: defaultDeviceUID
preferences.title: Default device UID
preferences.description: Optional. Used for the 'Default device' option in Route to Device.

preferences.name: deviceUIDOverrides
preferences.title: Device UID overrides
preferences.description: Optional. If Route to Device sets a device to empty, add a line: Device Name=UID. One per line.

scripts.build:cli: swiftc -O -o assets/finetune-audio-apps scripts/finetune-audio-apps.swift -framework AudioToolbox -framework AppKit -framework Foundation && swiftc -O -o assets/finetune-output-devices scripts/finetune-output-devices.swift -framework AudioToolbox -framework Foundation
scripts.build: npm run build:cli 2>/dev/null || true && ray build
scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
